name: Rose
bio:
Shrine Maiden of the Pure Sight Shrine, a rare expert in Spiritual Literature. She cares deeply about matters related to her older sister and is a natural optimist.

Role: Magical Group Control
Specialty: A mid-backline Control-type hero that can deal massive Control effects and area damage.

skillSlots.name: Blade Storm
skillSlots.description: <color=#FFEB04>Passive</color>: Rose can trigger a Basic Attack when killing enemies. When actively released, deals 160% M.DMG to front/midline enemies with 80% probability to apply [Sigil].

skillSlots.name: Death Lotus Bloom
skillSlots.description: Attacks all enemy targets for total 600% M.DMG (each enemy cannot take more than 3x Caster's ATK), dealing extra 100% M.DMG to 2 enemies with lowest HP.

effects.name: Bloodthirst Twinblades
effects.description: 40% + 3*[Chill] stacks probability for allies to perform Basic Attack After attacking (max 3 triggers per turn).

effects.name: Bloodthirst Twinblades
effects.description: Gains 1 stack of [Chill] after each attack.

effects.name: Bloodthirst Twinblades
effects.description: Gains 2 extra stacks of [Chill] when killing enemies.

effects.name: Bloodthirst Twinblades
effects.description: If target's HP is below 10% after Rose deals DMG, execute target (ignores Shield, Damage Share, DEF, max 200% ATK).
